name_en: 【Top Grade】M13212 👏👏 Monogram Denim Victorine Wallet, a seasonal release featuring a vibrant blue tone. Made from organic cotton with leather lining, it features multiple pockets and slots to secure cards, tickets, and coins. Gold-tone rivets add a touch of sophistication. Size: 12x2.5x9.5cm. 🎁🎁
